sagemaker.endpointconfig.productionvaria:
**Important**  
Serverless Inference is in preview release for Amazon SageMaker and is subject to change. We do not recommend using this feature in production environments.

Specifies the serverless configuration for an endpoint variant.

sagemaker.endpointconfig.productionvaria.Description: The maximum number of concurrent invocations your serverless endpoint can process.
The memory size of your serverless endpoint. Valid values are in 1 GB increments: 1024 MB, 2048 MB, 3072 MB, 4096 MB, 5120 MB, or 6144 MB.
